verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a type II membrane-bound glycoprotein resident in the Golgi apparatus. Its N-terminal hydrophobic signal sequence is uncleaved and functions as a transmembrane anchor, but the protein is localized to the Golgi (an endomembrane compartment), not the plasma membrane. Type II Golgi glycoproteins are not accessible from the extracellular face of the plasma membrane under baseline conditions.
